## How to verify

- [ ] `python -m pytest <plugin>/bot/tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Plugin README (all 7 locales if user-facing content changed)
- [ ] `plugins.yaml` updated if status, path, or `needs_token` changed
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` rules followed (required README sections, combo-matrix entry)
- [ ] CI green on this PR before merge
